content.en:
Source Sea.

On this day, a replica body of Ye Tian stood in the source sea, watching the changes in the source sea.

"After so many eternal epochs, Yuanhai is finally about to transform again. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, Yuanhai has given birth to many legendary lords, and even the human race has given birth to many legendary lords with his help, and his wives and children are also legendary lords.

The number of Legendary Lords of the Source Sea continues to explode, causing the evolution of the Source Sea to accelerate.

Now, the Source Sea is about to evolve into the Eternal Sea in its final form, that is, the huge Eternal Sea that is comparable to the Infinite Sea and other Eternal Seas.

At that time, the resources of the source sea will explode quickly.

At that time, the value of the source sea will be very high, and it will even be enough to attract the attention of some ordinary legendary realm lords~.

If it was before, Ye Tian was afraid that he would not have any hope of protecting the Source Sea, even if it was really no Holy Land, it would be difficult to completely occupy an Eternal Sea, but now there is still some hope.

Of course.

It is impossible for Ye Tian not to allow others to enter the Source Sea, he can only be called the master of the Source Sea in name, but if others want to come in, they still have to be allowed.

Unless one day, he broke through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord, and he was invincible among the Peak Legendary Realm Lords, he wanted to use an eternal sea like the Source Sea as his personal territory, then no one objected, and he didn't dare to object.

But for now, forget it.

However, the Terrans occupy the best territory, and as their own territory, he can still do it.

"I don't know if there will be any amazing chances born in the Source Sea, it is said that when every Eternal Sea forms a final transformation, some chances will be born, and some of them are even interested in the Peak Legend Realm Lord. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He just waited here in silence.

And the transformation of the source sea, there are also many forces paying attention.

For many forces in the Void Region, the eventual transformation and evolution of the Source Sea this time is also a big deal.

After a long time, the transformation and evolution of the source sea was completed.

At this time, the overall energy of the source sea has been raised by several grades, and a large number of resources are born.

However, Ye Tian was not interested in general resources, and he didn't pay attention to them.

But suddenly.

Somewhere in the source sea, a mysterious aura permeated the air.

That's the breath of eternity!

Ordinary Eternal Arcana can't attract Legendary Realm Lords, so it just attracts some Legendary Lords, and even half-step Legendary Realm Lords don't care.

However, this time, the aura of eternal treasure is very unusual.

"Superior Eternal Treasure!!"

Ye Tian's expression moved.

Almost all of the high-ranking Eternal Treasures are in the hands of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords, and only a very small number of Legendary Realm Lords with deep backgrounds possess the Earth Ice Constant Treasure.

Ye Tian didn't have a top-level eternal treasure in his hands, not even a true holy land.

The value of a high-level Eternal Treasure even surpasses that of hundreds of Median Eternal Treasures, and it cannot be purchased at all.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled over in an instant, and his eyes saw a faceless statue located in the depths of countless time and space through the layers of time and space.

This statue is the Superior Eternal Treasure!

However, this Superior Eternal Treasure has not yet been completely conceived, and it will take time.

Moreover, it is somewhat difficult to take the Eternal Treasure, just like the average Legendary Lord wants to take the Eternal Treasure, it is difficult to reach the ordinary Eternal Treasure, and you must have enough strength, or comprehend the Eternal Path contained in it, before you can take the Eternal Treasure.

And the Upper Eternal Treasure, for ordinary Legendary Realm Lords, is the same, if you want to take it away, it will take a little time.

However, it was not difficult for Ye Tian to take away this Superior Eternal Treasure, he had controlled a variety of Daos, so he could use the power of various Daos to reach this Superior Eternal Treasure.

Now, all he had to do was wait for the birth of the Superior Eternal Arcana.

However, there are probably a lot of Legendary Realm Lords who want to compete for this Upper Eternal Treasure, and there will even be a peak Legendary Realm Lord coming.

He was not afraid of other Legendary Realm Lords, but he was not defeated by the Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

If the Peak Legendary Realm Lord arrived, he wouldn't be able to compete at all.

"I still need to inform the Lord of the Word.

Ye Tian immediately summoned the Lord of the Underword.

The next moment.

The Lord of the Word has arrived at the Source Sea.

"Endless Lord, the source sea has actually given birth to the Eternal Treasure of the Upper Rank of Xing Piece. "

The Stygian Lord was a little surprised.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Lord of Darkness hurriedly said, "Don't worry, this Superior Eternal Treasure was discovered by you, and I will not fight for it." I'll block the aura here first, otherwise the Superior Eternal Treasure won't be able to hide it at all. "

The next moment.

The Lord of the Word mobilized the power of time and space to seal off this place.

Suddenly, the aura of the Superior Eternal Treasure was completely blocked, and such a method was something that ordinary Legendary Realm Lords could not do at all.

"It's not good, there's a peak Legendary Realm lord here, it seems that the news of the blockade has been delayed. "

The Lord of the Word said solemnly.

"Who's that?"

Ye Tian looked over.

Tear and pull!

A figure shuttled in, and it was the Impermanence Lord of the Infinite Sea.

"Superior Eternal Treasure, hahaha, it seems that my luck is good!"

.......... ，

Lord Wuheng laughed.

The Lord of the Dark Word frowned and said, "Lord of Impermanence, this Supreme Eternal Treasure is in the territory of our True Unholy Land, and it is the first one we discovered, it belongs to our True Unholy Land."

Lord Wuheng sneered: "The treasure is destined to be obtained, if it is in whose territory it belongs to whom, there will not be so much competition and fighting in the Void Region, even if it is in your hands, I want to snatch it, so what? Lord of the Underworld, you are just a lord who has just broken through to the peak of the Legendary Realm, I'm afraid you haven't even comprehended a top-notch supreme skill, it's not my opponent billion."

The Lord of the Dark Word was not afraid and said, "Lord Wuheng, you have also created a top-notch eternal technique, and your strength is not much stronger than mine. "

The two sides did not make a move, because this Superior Eternal Treasure had not yet been born.

Of course, they didn't notify the other peak Legendary Realm Lords, after all, one more person would be one more competition

Abrupt.

One after another Legendary Realm Lords came, all of them were Legendary Realm Lords of the Imperpetual Holy Land, and one of them was the Lord of Blackwater.

And on the side of the True Saintless Land, one by one the Legendary Realm Lords also came.

Although the strength of the True Immortal Holy Land is not as good as that of the Immortal Holy Land, this time it cannot be cowardly.

Of course.

There is really no holy land to dare to be so confident, and send so many Legendary Realm Lords, not to seek death, but to send a message from Ye Tian.

"Lord of the Word, you can hold the Lord of Wuheng back, and the other Legendary Realm Lords will be handed over to me!"

Ye Tian was extremely confident.

The Lord of the Dark Word understood in an instant that Ye Tian's strength had reached a very terrifying level of nine. _
